name: Veritate 80M (default base model, two-phase QAT)
description: The default base model trainer at 80M. Pure-vanilla Veritate, tuned for byte-level TinyStories coherence and fast iteration (~30-60 min phase A on 12 GB). Two-phase recipe: train non-QAT first (qat_enabled=false), then resume with qat_enabled=true for the last ~25% of the budget. Exports to a v9 INT8 binary that loads cleanly on the C engine. Same hyperparameter family as veritate_200, retuned for the smaller scale: higher peak LR, larger batch, no activation checkpointing.
